metadata.description: Use CloudGrid to go from idea to live app. Skills + MCP for brainstorming, planning, building, and deploying apps, games, landing pages, dashboards, and full-stack projects - for technical and non-technical users.

plugins.name: cloudgrid
plugins.description: Use CloudGrid to build and deploy real apps from a conversation: brainstorm, plan, build (games, landing pages, dashboards, full-stack), add databases and AI, and publish to a live URL. Bundles the CloudGrid MCP.
